examples: The book Cha Jing was written by Lu Yu.
Later, people called the leaves that saved his life "Cha (tea)".
More than 4,000 years later, Lu Yu, "the saint of tea", mentioned Shen Nong in his book Cha Jing.
Back then, businessmen would meet in teahouses in the late morning to yum cha (drink tea).
Mercedes Cha, the gregarious South Korean owner of Gawon Apparel, is a devout Presbyterian.
